revision.comment: Sync from repo need_translation/ [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24615006798|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:隼神社 (京都市)]] <!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Expand Japanese|隼神社 (京都市)}}
{{Infobox religious building | name = Hayabusa Shrine (Q135021848) | native_name = 隼神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hayabusa Shrine (Q135021848) | coordinates = {{coord|35.006045|135.744362}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Hayabusa Shrine'''|隼神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[the Imperial Palace]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286}} ** Series ordinal: 15 * {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287}} * {{ill|Shrine receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrine receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|qid=Q135009132}} * {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha|qid=Q135160338}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=180569</ref> * {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|qid=Q135018062}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=180569</ref> ** Series ordinal: 28 * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601}}
== part of (P361) ==
* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in the Imperial Palace|lt=List of Shikinaisha in the Imperial Palace|ja|宮中・京中の式内社一覧|simple|List of Shikinaisha in the Imperial Palace|qid=Q11453224}} ** Series ordinal: 15 ** P155: {{ill|Kushimachinomikotono Shrine|lt=Kushimachinomikotono Shrine|qid=Q135021846}} ** P156: {{ill|Hazukashi Shrine|lt=Hazukashi Shrine|ja|羽束師坐高御産日神社|qid=Q65278999}}
== coordinate location (P625) ==
* {{coord|35.006045|135.744362}}
== described by source (P1343) ==
* {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|qid=Q135037878}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041121152817/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=1901
== replaced by (P1366) ==
* {{ill|Nagi Shrine|lt=Nagi Shrine|ja|梛神社|qid=Q11538723}}
== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==
* 180569 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299}}
